lines.name: Presets
lines.description: Apply Combis and Preset for "normal" Planets

lines.name: Pressure
lines.description: Use lifter too suck if 75k Pa

lines.name: Atmo
lines.description: Wait for Atmo if Suck = yes

lines.name: Space Chemestry Array
lines.description: Turns off SCA Expansion if there is no Methane in Space Storage

lines.name: Check Temp
lines.description: If Temp over Target Lantern off + MHS , Running with Pulsar disable this , also removed Lanterns/Mirror from Building Preset

lines.name: Rogue
lines.description: Rogue check , Mirror off, can be ignored cause Pulsar

lines.name: Thruster
lines.description: If Day is too long build Thruster

lines.name: Settle
lines.description: wait for 10 Settlements to be build

lines.name: Dome Town
lines.description: Build Dome Town

lines.name: Dome City
lines.description: Check if Dome City unlocked for upgrade + Android Storage upgrade

lines.name: Metro
lines.description: Metro Unlock

lines.name: Metroline100
lines.description: 5M Upgrade to Metro100 Android Storage

lines.name: Metroline1k
lines.description: Upgrade to metro1k + + MHS off

lines.name: Metroline10k
lines.description: Upgrade to Metro10k

lines.name: Antimatter Bat
lines.description: Switch Battery Type to Antimatter

lines.name: SuperFusion
lines.description: Upgrade Fusion Preset

lines.name: Radio Waste
lines.description: Turns off Radioactive Recycler , turn on Arti Sky

lines.name: MetroOverdrive
lines.description: 89-10- Metro-Android  , turn on Aerostats

lines.name: Fusioned
lines.description: Wait for Fusion to be Upgraded + Dyson Off , aproximation of Net Rate Superalloy > Net Rate Normal Fusion

lines.name: GarbSorter
lines.description: GarbageSorter off, turn on trash+some more Workers for scrap recycler

lines.name: Pulsar
lines.description: Wait for Pulsar to be finished , shift Ships , do Lanterns fixed , Water for Surface

lines.name: Arti check temp
lines.description: Build fixed Lantern if not arti

lines.name: Trashway
lines.description: Turn off Trash , Increase Warpnet cause should have enough Fusion

lines.name: Ecu Unlock
lines.description: Wait for Ecu unlock to do arti check

lines.name: Overheat
lines.description: Build MHS if temp is too far from trend

lines.name: Light
lines.description: Wait for Temp and Light + enable Biodome 1% Landshare, fallback if something fs up , disable MHS see above

lines.name: Arti check
lines.description: Ecu Upgrade and Andro storage off

lines.name: Colour
lines.description: Disable Dust Factories Again

lines.name: Arti or Large enough world
lines.description: Build Manu on Arti

lines.name: Foundry
lines.description: Build Foundry if Base Land >100B but cost is so large i rather wont bother

lines.name: Bioworld
lines.description: Build Bioworld if not Arti

lines.name: Holy World
lines.description: Add Ecus

lines.name: temp OK
lines.description: Check for Trend+Temp >25C

lines.name: Overheat again
lines.description: no Clue why Temp goes over

lines.name: BioWorld Maxed
lines.description: Build Manu World regardless of Size because Bioworld Points maxed (Max Ecu , Andro off , Aero 1500%), turn off MHS see Step 27

lines.name: Speci check
lines.description: Wait either for Pop to be 99% filled when Manu or ignore when Bioworld or Holy World

lines.name: Arti travel
lines.description: Apply travel to stored arti

lines.name: Travel
lines.description: Wait for Terraform , activate Autotravel

lines.name: Wait
lines.description: Sleep to see if Arti Travel happens

lines.name: Random
lines.description: Apply Random Travel Preset if no Arti Travel

lines.name: Giga Project
lines.description: Set Giga Projects +Lifters/Spacechem for Space Checks

lines.name: GigAlloy
lines.description: Check if Metal prod is higher than SuperAlloys , if yes build

lines.name: Spenergy
lines.description: Build Artistars if Spenergy is too low

lines.name: Molten
lines.description: Use Molten Script

lines.name: Gasgiant
lines.description: Use Gasgiant Script

lines.name: Anything Else
lines.description: If none of the above use Standard Script

lines.name: Start
lines.description: Start Building Gas Giant Stuff, turn on Hydrogendispo

lines.name: Fusion
lines.description: turn off Dyson when Fusion produces more than Dyson

lines.name: garbage
lines.description: Turn off Garbage and change workers to Component+Cloning  do arti sky and increase warpnet

lines.name: RadWaste
lines.description: Turn of RadRecycler , turn on Trashdump

lines.name: Trash
lines.description: Turn off Trash+Oxygen+ChemReactor

lines.name: Pop
lines.description: get over 500T , should be enough infrastructure for ArtiCrust , turn on Arti Sky, start Gaslifting

lines.name: L Hydro away
lines.description: wait for Hydrogen  , Turn on MHS+Arti Crust and Space Mirrors , turn general disposal back on , turn on CO2N2 again

lines.name: Core
lines.description: wait till flux is away + Temp low , Aerostats to Aeronet limit , build some Cylinders , sleep 5s

lines.name: Atmo
lines.description: wait for Atmo to be near Range and do Water + MHS off

lines.name: Mars
lines.description: Black Dust

lines.name: Temp stable
lines.description: Wait for Temp to be stable below 25C, build Metros+Andro+Biodomes

lines.name: Choose
lines.description: Add Specialisation

lines.name: Foundry
lines.description: more Storage when not enough

lines.name: Pop Filled
lines.description: Wait for Pop to be higher than 500x geometric Land

lines.name: terraform
lines.description: wait for terraforming

lines.name: Start
lines.description: Apply MoltenCore stuff

lines.name: ArtCrust
lines.description: Start Artificial Crust after Fusion has been built enough

lines.name: RadWaste
lines.description: Turn off Radio Recyclers

lines.name: GarbWaste
lines.description: Turn off Garbage

lines.name: Fluxed
lines.description: Sleep a few seconds , for overbuilding Heatsinks , start Arti Sky

lines.name: Crust yes
lines.description: turn off arti crust+megaHS + change building

lines.name: Colour
lines.description: Turn off Dust

lines.name: Arti Sky
lines.description: Wait for Arti Sky finish , turn on MHS

lines.name: Temp
lines.description: turn off Mirrors, turn off MHS, increase Aero

lines.name: TrashWaste
lines.description: Trash the Trasher

lines.name: Foundry
lines.description: Set Foundry

lines.name: Manu
lines.description: set manufactory after Terraform complete
more Aero+increase warpnet slider

lines.name: Storage Check
lines.description: if Storage is below 10T set 10T

lines.name: Storage fill
lines.description: Wait for Storage to be filled 5% before increasing further

lines.name: Foundry
lines.description: Wait for Foundry or Manu to be finished

lines.name: Trava
lines.description: wait for Travel

operations.summary: Natural Science challenge (Freya): roll [1] + skill 2.01k (total 2.01k) vs DC 1.52k => Success +204.00 Artifacts
Social Science challenge (Noel): roll [9] + skill 2.01k (total 2.02k) vs DC 1.52k => Success +102.00 Artifacts
Individual Athletics Challenge (June): roll [5] + skill 1.88k + leader 671.00 (total 2.56k) vs DC 1.52k => Success +102.00 Artifacts
Team Wits Challenge: roll [15,10,3,7] + skill 7.67k (total 7.70k) vs DC 4.08k => Success +102.00 Artifacts
